title: tachigali ferruginea
intro: Tachigali ferruginea, also known as the iron-plated tachigali, is a species of plant in the family Tachigaliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tachigali ferruginea include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Tachigali ferruginea typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
